meta.title: Modern Defense Evasion in IoT Botnets
meta.description: Alexey Kleymenov describes how IoT botnets are finding ways to evade / get past security controls. He begins using Mirai and its clones evolution as an example. Then he moves to changes in IoT Botnet code, packers and other elements his research team saw in 2022.
